description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named compiler-python-build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build and test. The build job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04, windows-2019, and macos-10.15 with Python 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9, checks out the code, sets up Ninja, installs system requirements, adds msbuild to PATH on Windows, sets up Python, installs Python requirements, installs Conan, configures Conan on Linux, and builds a wheel with setup.py. The test job runs on the same matrix, checks out the code, sets up Ninja, installs system requirements, sets up Python, installs Python packages, creates a test environment, downloads a build artifact, installs nncase, and runs tests with pytest.
